history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The cell directly in front of me, row 02 column C, is lava, so moving forward would be deadly. The goal is below and to the right, so I should turn to face down first.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down. The cell in front of me, row 03 column B, is safe floor, and moving forward brings me closer to the goal at row 04 column D while avoiding lava.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down. The cell in front of me, row 04 column B, is safe floor. Moving forward is the best next step toward the goal at row 04 column D.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The cell in front of me is a wall boundary at row 05 column B, so I cannot go forward. The goal is to my right at row 04 column D, so I should rotate to face right.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing right. The next cell to the right, row 04 column C, is safe floor, and moving forward brings me closer to the goal at row 04 column D.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column C facing right. The goal is immediately ahead at row 04 column D, so I should move forward to reach it.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
